name: @fora/mcp-azure-devops
description: FORA Azure DevOps MCP server — exposes list_projects, list_repos, list_pipelines, run_pipeline, get_pipeline_run, list_work_items, get_work_item, create_work_item, add_work_item_comment over MCP/stdio. Auth via project-scoped PAT. Pinned to a single Azure DevOps org + project on startup.
